name: Garelu (Medu Vada)
steps: Soak the urad dal for four hours and grind into a thick, fluffy batter with minimal water.
Mix in chopped chillies, ginger, curry leaves, pepper and salt.
Wet your hands, shape a ball, flatten and make a hole in the center.
Slide into hot oil and fry until golden and crisp.
Serve hot with chutney — a must for every festival!
